TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Patawlinan, title = Patawlinan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Patawlinan} }

S.FORM: Patawlinan Itiniay i Yuli Cen no Hualien ko Patawlinan a niyaro', 439 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,158 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 40% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 467 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 60% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 691 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 34%, Bunun 1%, Tayal 1%, Puyuma 1%, roma 2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: patawɾinan itiniaj i jo~u~uɾi ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u patawɾinan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tajaɾ *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Patawlinan Itiniay i Yuli Cen no Hualien ko Patawlinan a niyaro', 439 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,158 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 40% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 467 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 60% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 691 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 34%, Bunun 1%, Tayal 1%, Puyuma 1%, roma 2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: patawɾinan itiniaj i jo~u~uɾi ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u patawɾinan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tajaɾ *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ.
